name: Savory Crepes
snippet: I love Crêpes but I have always been too intimidated to make them.   I decided it was finally time to face my fears and try my hand at the French pancakes for Test Kitchen Tuesday.  I cannot believe how easy they were to make, I should have tried this a long time ago!  Usually I opt for sweet crêpes, but today I was in the mood for something savory and filling.  I think I may have found the perfect lunch or light dinner option for summer.  Substituting Brown Rice Flour and Coconut Milk gave me a clean version I could enjoy guilt-free and the addition of fresh herbs provided added flavor and aroma.  I can’t wait to make these again, I am already brainstorming all of the variations I can try!  I am providing the recipe for the filling I used but feel free to use any filling and or dressing you desire.
